{{Missing Info|specifics=form, element, realm, second HARD}}

{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The Traveler known as Wisdom Walker once worried over what artifact to take with it on a retreat, until one day he got an idea while beating on a temple block, and the Snail Shell was born.
|affct=FTH
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=5230
|relic1=Mahakala Statue
|relic2=Statue of Gudea
|relic3=The Prayer
|relic4=San Damiano Cross
|relic5=Seated Voltaire
}}
|color=green
|earth=2
|water=1
|fire=2
|wind=1
|form=
|element=
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}
